arabic text: دُعَاؤُهُ عِنْدَ خَتْمِهِ الْقُرْآنَ
english translation text:
Dua Khatmul Qur’aanBy Imam Sajjad (a.s)
Sahifa As-Sajjadiya
Dua No - 42

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text:
O Alláh bless
Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ إنَّكَ أَعَنْتَنِي عَلَى خَتْمِ كِتَابِكَ
english translation text: O Allah, you have helped me complete your book

arabic text: الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَهُ نُوراً وَجَعَلْتَهُ مُهَيْمِناً
english translation text: which you sent down as a light and appointed as a guardian

arabic text: عَلَى كُلِّ كِتَابٍ أَنْزَلْتَهُ،
english translation text: over every book You have sent down,

arabic text: وَفَضَّلْتَهُ عَلَى كُلِّ حَدِيثٍ قَصَصْتَهُ
english translation text: preferring it over every narrative which You have recounted,

arabic text: وَفُرْقَاناً فَرَقْتَ بِهِ بَيْنَ حَلالِكَ وَحَرَامِكَ،
english translation text: a separator, through which You have separated Your lawful from Your unlawful,

arabic text: وَقُرْآناً أَعْرَبْتَ بِهِ عَنْ شَرَائِعِ أَحْكَامِكَ،
english translation text: a Qur’an, through which You have made plain the ways of Your commandments,

arabic text: وَكِتَاباً فَصَّلْتَهُ لِعِبَادِكَ تَفْصِيلاً،
english translation text: a book, which You have distinguished very distinctly for Your servants,

arabic text: وَوَحْياً أَنْزَلْتَهُ عَلَى نَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ تَنْزِيلاً،
english translation text: a revelation, which You have sent down, a sending down, upon Your prophet Muhammad(Your blessings be upon him and his Household).

arabic text: وَجَعَلْتَهُ نُوراً نَهْتَدِي مِنْ ظُلَمِ الضَّلاَلَةِ وَالْجَهَـالَةِ بِـاتِّبَاعِـهِ،
english translation text: You appointed it a light through following which we may be guided from the shadows of error and ignorance,

arabic text: وَشِفَـاءً لِمَنْ أَنْصَتَ بِفَهْمِ التَّصْدِيقِ إلَى اسْتِمَاعِهِ،
english translation text: a healing to him who gives ear, with sincerity of understanding, upon listening to it;

arabic text: وَمِيزَانَ قِسْطِ لاَ يَحِيْفُ عَنِ الْحَقِّ لِسَانُهُ،
english translation text: a just balance whose tongue does not incline away from truth,

arabic text: وَنُورَ هُدىً لاَ يُطْفَأُ عَنِ الشَّاهِدِينَ بُرْهَانُهُ،
english translation text: a light of guidance whose proof is not extinguished before the witnesses,

arabic text: وَعَلَمَ نَجَاةٍ لاَ يَضِلُّ مَنْ أَمَّ قَصْدَ سُنَّتِهِ
english translation text: and a guidepost of deliverance, so that he who repairs straight way to its prescription will not go astray

arabic text: وَلاَ تَنَالُ أَيْدِي الْهَلَكَاتِ مَنْ تَعَلَّقَ بِعُرْوَةِ عِصْمَتِهِ،
english translation text: And he who clings to its preservation's handhold will not be touched by the hands of disasters.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ فَإذْ أَفَدْتَنَا الْمَعُونَةَ عَلَى تِلاَوَتِهِ،
english translation text: O Allah, since You have given us help to recite it

arabic text: وَسَهَّلْتَ جَوَاسِيَ أَلْسِنَتِنَا بِحُسْنِ عِبَارَتِهِ،
english translation text: made smooth the roughness of our tongues through the beauty of its expression,

arabic text: فَاجْعَلْنَا مِمَّنْ يَرْعَاهُ حَقَّ رِعَايَتِهِ،
english translation text: place us among those who observe it as it should be observed,

arabic text: وَيَدِينُ لَكَ بِاعْتِقَادِ التَّسْلِيْمِ لِمُحْكَمِ آيَاتِهِ،
english translation text: serve You by adhering in submission to the firm text of its verses, and

arabic text: وَيَفْزَعُ إلى الإِقْرَارِ بِمُتَشَابِهِهِ وَمُوضَحَاتِ بَيِّنَاتِهِ.
english translation text: seek refuge in admitting both its ambiguous parts and the meaning of its clear signs

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ إنَّكَ أَنْزَلْتَهُ عَلَى نَبِيِّكَ
english translation text: O Allah, You sent it down upon Your prophet

arabic text: مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ مُجْمَلاً،
english translation text: Muhammad (Allah bless him and his household) in summary form

arabic text: وَأَلْهَمْتَهُ عِلْمَ عَجَائِبِهِ مُكَمَّلاً،
english translation text: inspired him with the science of its wonders to complement it,

arabic text: وَ وَرَّثْتَنَا عِلْمَهُ مُفَسَّراً،
english translation text: made us the heirs of its knowledge as interpreters,

arabic text: وَفَضَّلْتَنَا عَلَى مَنْ جَهِلَ عِلْمَهُ،
english translation text: made us to surpass him who is ignorant of its knowledge,

arabic text: وَقَوَّيْتَنَا عَلَيْهِ لِتَرْفَعَنَا فَوْقَ مَنْ لَمْ يُطِقْ حَمْلَهُ.
english translation text: And gave us strength over it to raise us above those not able to carry it.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا جَعَلْتَ قُلُوبَنَا لَهُ حَمَلَةً،
english translation text: O Allah, just as You have appointed our hearts as its carriers

arabic text: وَعَرَّفْتَنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ شَرَفَهُ وَفَضْلَهُ،
english translation text: And made known to us through Your mercy its nobility and excellence,

arabic text: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ الْخَطِيْبِ بِهِ،
english translation text: so also bless Muhammad, its preacher,

arabic text: وَعَلَى آلِهِ الْخُزَّانِ لَهُ،
english translation text: and his Household, its guardians,

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْنَا مِمَّنْ يَعْتَرِفُ بِأَنـَّهُ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ
english translation text: And place us among those who confess that it has come from You,

arabic text: حَتَّى لاَ يُعَارِضَنَا الشَّكُّ فِي تَصْدِيقِهِ
english translation text: Till there may be no doubt in our minds when affirming its truth,

arabic text: وَ لاَ يَخْتَلِجَنَا الزَّيْغُ عَنْ قَصْدِ طَرِيقِهِ.
english translation text: or deviation from its straightforward path shake us

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِـهِ،
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْنَا مِمَّنْ يَعْتَصِمُ بِحَبْلِهِ،
english translation text: And make us one of those who hold fast to its cord,

arabic text: وَيَـأْوِي مِنَ الْمُتَشَـابِهَاتِ إلَى حِرْزِ مَعْقِلِهِ،
english translation text: seek haven from its ambiguities in its fortified stronghold,

arabic text: وَيَسْكُنُ فِي ظِـلِّ جَنَاحِهِ،
english translation text: rest in the shadow of its wing,

arabic text: وَيَهْتَدِي بِضَوْءِ صَبَاحِهِ،
english translation text: find guidance in the brightness of its morning,

arabic text: وَيَقْتَدِي بِتَبَلُّجِ إسْفَارِهِ،
english translation text: follow the shining of its disclosure,

arabic text: وَيَسْتَصْبِحُ بِمِصْبَاحِهِ،
english translation text: acquire light from its lamp,

arabic text: وَلاَ يَلْتَمِسُ الْهُدَى فِي غَيْرِهِ.
english translation text: And do not seek direction from any other than it.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ وَكَمَا نَصَبْتَ بِهِ مُحَمَّداً عَلَماً لِلدَّلالَةِ عَلَيْكَ،
english translation text: O Allah, just as through it You have set up Muhammad as a guidepost to point to You

arabic text: وَأَنْهَجْتَ بِآلِهِ سُبُلَ الرِّضَا إلَيْكَ.
english translation text: And through his Household You have made clear Your good pleasure's roads to You,

arabic text: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: so also bless Muhammad and his Household

arabic text: وَاجْعَلِ القُرْآنَ وَسِيلَةً لَنَا إلَى أَشْرَفِ مَنَازِلِ الْكَرَامَةِ،
english translation text: And make the Qur’an our mediation to the noblest stations of Your honour,

arabic text: وَسُلَّماً نَعْرُجُ فِيهِ إلَى مَحَلِّ السَّلامَةِ،
english translation text: a ladder by which we may climb to the place of safety,

arabic text: وَسَبَباً نُجْزَى بِهِ النَّجَاةَ فِي عَرْصَةِ الْقِيَامَةِ،
english translation text: a cause for our being repaid with deliverance at the Plain of Resurrection,

arabic text: وَذَرِيعَةً نُقْدِمُ بِهَا عَلَى نَعِيْمِ دَارِ الْمُقَامَةِ.
english translation text: a means whereby we may reach the bliss of the House of Permanence

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,

arabic text: وَاحْطُطْ بالْقُرْآنِ عَنَّا ثِقْلَ الأوْزَارِ،
english translation text: lessen for us through the Qur’an the weight of heavy sins,

arabic text: وَهَبْ لَنَا حُسْنَ شَمَائِلِ الأَبْرَارِ
english translation text: give to us the excellent qualities of the pious,

arabic text: وَاقْفُ بِنَا آثَارَ الَّذِينَ قَامُوا لَكَ بِهِ
english translation text: And make us follow the tracks of those who stood before You

arabic text: آنَاءَ اللَّيْلِ وَأَطْرَافَ النَّهَارِ
english translation text: In the watches of the night and the ends of the day,

arabic text: حَتَّى تُطَهِّرَنَا مِنْ كُلِّ دَنَسٍ بِتَطْهِيرِهِ،
english translation text: such that You purify us from every defilement through its purification

arabic text: وَتَقْفُوَ بِنَا آثَارَ الَّذِينَ اسْتَضَـآءُوْا بِنُورِهِ،
english translation text: And make us to follow the tracks of those who have taken illumination from its light

arabic text: وَلَمْ يُلْهِهِمُ الأَمَلُ عَنِ الْعَمَـلِ فَيَقْطَعَهُمْ بِخُدَعِ غُرُورِهِ.
english translation text: and whom expectation has not distracted from works, cutting them off through its delusions' deceptions!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household

arabic text: واجْعَلِ القُرْآنَ لَنَا فِي ظُلَمِ اللَّيَالِي مُونِساً
english translation text: And appoint the Qur’an for us a companion in the darkness of nights

arabic text: وَمِنْ نَزَغَاتِ الشَّيْطَانِ وَخَطَرَاتِ الْوَسَاوِسِ حَارِساً،
english translation text: And a guardian against the instigations of Satan and confusing thoughts,

arabic text: وَلِأَقْدَامِنَا عَنْ نَقْلِهَا إلَى الْمَعَاصِيْ حَابِساً،
english translation text: And a restraint to our steps from moving towards sin,

arabic text: وَلِأَلْسِنَتِنَا عَنِ الْخَوْضِ فِي البَاطِلِ مِنْ غَيْرِ مَا آفَةٍ مُخْرِساً،
english translation text: for our tongues a silencer without blight preventing a plunge into falsehood,

arabic text: وَلِجَوَارِحِنَا عَنِ اقْتِرَافِ الآثَامِ زَاجِراً،
english translation text: for our limbs a restrainer from committing sins,

arabic text: وَلِمَا طَوَتِ الغَفْلَةُ عَنَّا مِنْ تَصَفُّحِ الاعْتِبَارِ نَاشِراً
english translation text: And an opener of the pages of warning which our negligence has kept shut,

arabic text: حَتَّى تُوصِلَ إلَى قُلُوبِنَا فَهْمَ عَجَائِبِهِ
english translation text: Such that You attach to our hearts the understanding of the Qur’an's wonders

arabic text: وَ زَوَاجِرَ أَمْثَـالِهِ الَّتِي ضَعُفَتِ الْجِبَالُ الرَّوَاسِي
english translation text: and its restraining similitudes which immovable mountains

arabic text: عَلَى صَلاَبَتِهَا عَنِ احْتِمَالِهِ.
english translation text: in all their solidity were too weak to carry!

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household

arabic text: وَأَدِمْ بِالْقُرْانِ صَلاَحَ ظَاهِرِنَا،
english translation text: And through the Qur’an make permanent the rightness of our outward selves,

arabic text: وَاحْجُبْ بِهِ خَطَرَاتِ الْوَسَاوِسِ عَنْ صِحَّةِ ضَمَائِرِنَا،
english translation text: veil the ideas of confusing thoughts from the soundness of our innermost minds,

arabic text: وَاغْسِلْ بِهِ دَرَنَ قُلُوبِنَا وَعَلاَئِقَ أَوْزَارِنَا،
english translation text: wash away the dirt of our hearts and the ties of our heavy sins,

arabic text: وَاجْمَعْ بِهِ مُنْتَشَرَ أُمُورِنَا،
english translation text: And gather our scattered affairs,

arabic text: وَأَرْوِ بِهِ فِي مَـوْقِفِ الْعَرْضِ عَلَيْكَ ظَمَأَ هَوَاجِرِنَا،
english translation text: quench the thirst of our burning heat in the standing place of the presentation to You,

arabic text: وَاكْسُنَا بِهِ حُلَلَ الأَمَانِ يَوْمَ الْفَزَعِ الأَكْبَرِ فِي نُشُورِنَا.
english translation text: And clothe us in the robes of security on the Day of the Greatest Terror at our uprising!

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household

arabic text: وَاجْبُرْ بِالْقُرْآنِ خَلَّتَنَا مِنْ عَدَمِ الإِمْلاَقِ،
english translation text: And through the Qur’an redress our lack—our destitution in poverty—

arabic text: وَسُقْ إلَيْنَا بِهِ رَغَدَ الْعَيْشِ وَخِصْبَ سَعَةِ الأَرْزَاقِ،
english translation text: drive toward us the comforts of life and an abundance of plentiful provisions,

arabic text: وَجَنِّبْنَا بِهِ الضَّرَائِبَ الْمَذْمُومَةَ وَمَدَانِيَ الأَخْلاَقِ،
english translation text: turn aside blameworthy character traits and low moral qualities,

arabic text: وَاعْصِمْنَا بِهِ مِنْ هُوَّةِ الكُفْرِ وَ دَوَاعِـي النِّفَاقِ
english translation text: And preserve us from the pit of unbelief and the motives for hypocrisy,

arabic text: حَتَّى يَكُوْنَ لَنَا فِي الْقِيَامَةِ إلَى رِضْوَانِكَ وَجِنَانِكَ قَائِداً
english translation text: such that the Qur’an may be for us at the resurrection a leader to Your good pleasure for us at the resurrection a leader to Your good pleasure and Your gardens,

arabic text: وَلَنَا فِي الدُّنْيا عَنْ سَخَطِكَ وَتَعَدِّي حُدُودِكَ ذَائِداً،
english translation text: for us in this world a protector against Your displeasure and transgressing Your bounds,

arabic text: وَلِمَا عِنْدَكَ بِتَحْلِيلِ حَلاَلِهِ وَتَحْرِيمِ حَرَامِهِ شَاهِداً.
english translation text: and a testimony unto You, of (our) having observed its commandment and prohibitions.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household

arabic text: وَهَوِّنْ بِالْقُرْآنِ عِنْدَ الْمَوْتِ عَلَى أَنْفُسِنَا كَرْبَ السِّيَاقِ،
english translation text: And at the time of death by means of the Qur’an, make easy for us the agony of separation of soul from body

arabic text: وَجَهْدَ الأَنِينِ، وَتَرَادُفَ الْحَشَارِجِ
english translation text: the effort of the moaning, and the succession of the rattling,

arabic text: إذَا بَلَغَتِ النُّفُوسُ التَّرَاقِيَ وَقِيلَ مَنْ رَاق
english translation text: “when souls reach the throats and it is said, ‘Where is the enchanter?’”

arabic text: وَتَجَلَّى مَلَكُ الْمَوْتِ لِقَبْضِهَا مِنْ حُجُبِ الْغُيُوبِ،
english translation text: when the angel of death discloses himself to seize them from behind the veils of unseen things,

arabic text: وَرَمَاهَا عَنْ قَوْسِ الْمَنَايَا بِأَسْهُمِ وَحْشَةِ الْفِرَاقِ،
english translation text: and letting loose at them from the bow of destinies the arrows of the terror of lonesome separation,

arabic text: وَدَافَ لَهَا مِنْ ذَعَافِ الْمَوْتِ كَأْساً مَسْمُومَةَ الْمَذَاقِ،
english translation text: And mixing for them from sudden death a cup poisoned to the taste;

arabic text: وَدَنَا مِنَّا إلَى الآخِرَةِ رَحِيلٌ وَانْطِلاَقٌ،
english translation text: And when departure and release for the hereafter come close to us,

arabic text: وَصَارَتِ الأَعْمَالُ قَلاَئِـدَ فِي الأَعْنَاقِ،
english translation text: And our actions become collars around the necks,

arabic text: وَكَانَتِ الْقُبُورُ هِيَ الْمَأْوَى إلَى مِيقَاتِ يَوْمِ التَّلاَقِ.
english translation text: And the graves become the resting place until the appointed time of the Day of Encounter!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,

arabic text: وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي حُلُولِ دَارِ الْبِلَى
english translation text: make blessed for us the arrival at the house of decay

arabic text: وَطُولِ الْمُقَامَـةِ بَيْنَ أَطْبَـاقِ الثَّـرَى،
english translation text: and the drawn out residence between the layers of the earth,

arabic text: وَاجْعَلِ القُبُورَ بَعْدَ فِرَاقِ الدُّنْيَا خَيْرَ مَنَازِلِنَا،
english translation text: appoint the graves, after separation from this world, the best of our way stations,

arabic text: وَافْسَحْ لَنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِي ضِيقِ مَلاَحِدِنَا،
english translation text: make roomy for us through Your mercy the narrowness of our tombs

arabic text: وَلا تَفْضَحْنَا فِي حَاضِرِي الْقِيَامَةِ بِمُوبِقَاتِ آثامِنَا،
english translation text: And disgrace us not among those present at the Resurrection through our ruinous sins!

arabic text: وَارْحَمْ بِالْقُرْانِ فِيْ مَوْقِفِ الْعَرْضِ عَلَيْكَ ذُلَّ مَقَامِنَا،
english translation text: Through the Qur’an have mercy upon the lowliness of our station at the standing place of presentation to You,

arabic text: وَثَبِّتْ بِهِ عِنْدَ اضْطِرَابِ جِسْرِ جَهَنَّمَيَوْمَ الْمَجَازِ عَلَيْهَـا زَلَلَ أَقْدَامِنَا،
english translation text: make firm the slips of our feet during the shaking of the bridge across hell on the day of passage over it,

arabic text: وَنَوِّرْ بِهِ قَبْلَ الْبَعْثِ سُدَفَ قُبُورِنَا،
english translation text: illuminate the darkness of our graves before the Uprising,

arabic text: وَنَجِّنَا بِهِ مِنْ كُلِّ كَرْبٍ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
english translation text: And deliver us from every distress on the Day of Resurrection

arabic text: وَشَدَائِدِ أَهْوَالِ يَوْمِ الطَّامَّةِ
english translation text: And from the hardships of terrors on the Day of Disaster!

arabic text: وَبَيِّضْ وُجُوهَنَا يَوْمَ تَسْوَدُّ وُجُوهُ الظَّلَمَةِ
english translation text: Brighten our faces on the day when the faces of wrongdoers shall grow dark

arabic text: فِي يَوْمِ الْحَسْرَةِ وَالنَّدَامَةِ،
english translation text: during the Day of Regret and Remorse,

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْ لَنَا فِي صُدُورِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وُدّاً،
english translation text: appoint love for us in the breasts of the faithful,

arabic text: وَلاَ تَجْعَلِ الْحَيَاةَ عَلَيْنَا نَكَداً.
english translation text: And make not life for us troublesome!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad, Your servant and Your messenger,

arabic text: كَمَا بَلَّغَ رِسَالَتَكَ، وَصَدَعَ بِأَمْرِكَ، وَنَصَحَ لِعِبَادِكَ.
english translation text: just as He delivered Your message, executed Your command, and advised Your servants!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ نَبِيَّنَا صَلَواتُكَ عَلَيْهِ
english translation text: O Allah, on the Day of Resurrection make our Prophet (Your blessings be upon him and his Household)

arabic text: وَعَلَى آلِهِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ أَقْرَبَ النِّبِيِّينَ مِنْكَ مَجْلِساً،
english translation text: the nearest of the prophets to You in seat,

arabic text: وَأَمْكَنَهُمْ مِنْكَ شَفَاعَةً، وَأَجَلَّهُمْ عِنْدَكَ قَدْراً،
english translation text: the ablest of them before You with intercession, the greatest of them with You in measure,

arabic text: وَأَوْجَهَهُمْ عِنْدَكَ جَاهَاً.
english translation text: And the most eminent of them with You in rank!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَشَرِّفْ بُنْيَانَهُ،
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, exalt his foundation,

arabic text: وَعَظِّمْ بُرْهَانَهُ، وَثَقِّلْ مِيزَانَهُ،
english translation text:
magnify his proof, make
weighty his balance,

arabic text: وَتَقَبَّلْ شَفَاعَتَهُ وَقَرِّبْ وَسِيلَتَهُ،
english translation text:
accept his intercession,
bring near his mediation,

arabic text: وَبَيِّضْ وَجْهَهُ، وَأَتِمَّ نُورَهُ،
english translation text:
brighten his face,
complete his light,

arabic text: وَارْفَعْ دَرَجَتَهُ، وَأَحْيِنَا عَلَى سُنَّتِهِ،
english translation text:
And raise his rank!
Make us live according to his Sunnah,

arabic text: وَتَوَفَّنَا عَلَى مِلَّتِهِ، وَخُذْ بِنَـا مِنْهَاجَـهُ،
english translation text: make us die in his creed, take us on his road,

arabic text: وَاسْلُكْ بِنَا سَبِيلَهُ، وَاجْعَلْنَا مِنْ أَهْلِ طَاعَتِهِ،
english translation text:
make us travel his path,
place us among the people who obey him,

arabic text: وَاحْشُرْنَا فِي زُمْرَتِهِ،
english translation text: Resurrect us among his congregation,

arabic text: وَأَوْرِدْنَا حَوْضَهُ، وَاسْقِنَا بِكَأسِهِ.
english translation text:
lead us to his pool,
and give us to drink of his cup!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ وَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: And bless Muhammad and his Household,

arabic text: صَلاةً تُبَلِّغُهُ بِهَا أَفْضَلَ
english translation text: with a blessing through which You will take him to the most excellent of Your good,

arabic text: مَا يَأْمُلُ مِنْ خَيْرِكَ وَفَضْلِكَ وَكَرَامَتِكَ
english translation text: Your bounty, and Your generosity for which he hopes!

arabic text: إنَّكَ ذُوْ رَحْمَةٍ وَاسِعَةٍ وَفَضْلٍ كَرِيمٍ.
english translation text: You are Possessor of boundless mercy and generous bounty.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ اجْزِهِ بِمَا بَلَّغَ مِنْ رِسَالاتِكَ
english translation text: O Allah, repay him for Your messages which he delivered,

arabic text: وَأَدَّى مِنْ آيَاتِكَ وَنَصَحَ لِعِبَادِكَ
english translation text: Your signs which he passed on, the good counsel he gave to Your servants,

arabic text: وَجَاهَدَ فِي سَبِيلِكَ أَفْضَلَ مَا جَزَيْتَ
english translation text: And the struggle he undertook in Your way, with the best You have repaid

arabic text: أَحَداً مِنْ مَلائِكَتِكَ الْمُقَرَّبِينَ وَأَنْبِيَائِكَ الْمُرْسَلِينَ الْمُصْطَفَيْنَ.
english translation text: any of Your angels brought near and Your prophets sent out and chosen!

arabic text: وَالسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ الطَّيِّبِينَ الطَّاهِرِينَ
english translation text: And upon him and his Household, the good, the pure,

arabic text: وَرَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ.
english translation text: Allah's mercy, and His blessings!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text:
O Alláh bless
Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
